sn56.20:1.1:
1
"Cattārimāni, bhikkhave, tathāni avitathāni anaññathāni. Katamāni cattāri?
sn56.20:1.2: ‘Idaṁ dukkhan’ti, bhikkhave, tathametaṁ avitathametaṁ anaññathametaṁ; ‘Ayaṁ dukkhasamudayo’ti tathametaṁ avitathametaṁ anaññathametaṁ; ‘Ayaṁ dukkhanirodho’ti tathametaṁ avitathametaṁ anaññathametaṁ; ‘Ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ti tathametaṁ avitathametaṁ anaññathametaṁ –
sn56.20:1.3: imāni kho, bhikkhave, cattāri tathāni avitathāni anaññathāni.
sn56.20:2.2:
2
Tasmātiha, bhikkhave, ‘idaṁ dukkhan’ti yogo karaṇīyo … pe … ‘Ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ti yogo karaṇīyo"ti.
Dasamaṁ.
Dhammacakkappavattanavaggo dutiyo.
3
Dhammacakkaṁ tathāgataṁ,
khandhā āyatanena ca;
Dhāraṇā ca dve avijjā,
vijjā saṅkāsanā tathāti.
